rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/tokenizer mismatch, cite the same crash line, confirm the DiT workaround, and note the request to track hardening in a new issue — matching the thread closely. X grounds more precisely (specific line ranges for both YAML headers, ties directly into Tencent's model_version guard, and hedges appropriately about lacking hardware to verify generation quality), while Y introduces an unverified third config file (`hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml`) in its table that isn't supported by any thread evidence, slightly weakening its grounding. Completeness is comparable, with X's numbered fix items mapping more tightly to the reporter's original two-part proposal.
